history.content: Can you open up X and confirm you get the browser shortcuts sent as a runtime hint

Yep — confirmed ✅

I opened X, and the runtime hint is present in two places:

- In-page banner text: **“To view keyboard shortcuts, press question mark”**
- Explicit runtime section: **“⌨️ SITE SHORTCUTS FOR x.com”** with the full shortcut list

So yes, shortcut hints are being sent correctly at runtime.

Restart complete — Prometheus is back up after the manual Telegram quick restart, and I’m active in-session. No files were changed in this restart; this was a clean runtime bounce to restore gateway operation and resume Telegram polling flow.

What do you want me to verify next: Telegram inbound receipt, outbound send, or full round-trip (receive → process → reply)?
